properties.name: cn
properties.description: 'Common Name' as defined in SSL certificate (hostname)

properties.name: tenant
properties.description: Name of the tenant for wich the BFF instance is spawned

properties.name: bff-client-id
properties.description: OAuth2 client ID defined on the OpenID Provider for the BFF to authenticate users

properties.name: bff-client-secret
properties.description: OAuth2 client secret defined on the OpenID Provider the BFF to authenticate users

properties.name: reverse-proxy-uri
properties.description: URI of the reverse proxy in front of the BFF and the frontend

properties.name: issuer
properties.description: OpenID Provider's identifier. The OpenID configuration should be available by appending /.well-known/openid-configuration to it

properties.name: api-internal-uri
properties.description: Root URI for the REST API
